calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-23-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Patrick Doyle, Esq., appeared, representing Plaintiff/Cross-Defendant/Respondent Michael McCahill, who is not present. Plaintiff/Respondent/Cross-Defendants Madeline Jones Roy and Rita Dolores Hilliard are not present.
Majeed Samara, Esq., appeared, representing Defendant/Cross-complainant/Appellant Ali Khostovan, who is also present.
This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Plaintiff/Respondent's counsel Patrick Doyle testified.
Defendant/Appellant Ali Khostovan testified.

The following documentary evidence is introduced.
Defendant/Appellant's A - 1440 Clement Street Lease
Defendant/Appellant's B - Construction Invoice
Defendant/Appellant's C - Residential Tenancy Agreement

Defendant's exhibits retained.

The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported. (606)
